pi_items.metadata_value: Scale an image to 50% of its original size while maintaining aspect ratio
pi_items.verified_value: The task setup downloads an 800x600 image and the verifier checks that it is scaled to 50% (±3% tolerance) while maintaining aspect ratio (±2% tolerance). Description is accurate.
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_scale_task.sh and verifier.py
Web download and PIL image verification

pi_items.verified_value: Verifier expects width_ratio and height_ratio both near 50% with tolerance of ±3%, which means acceptable range is 377-423 px width and 282-318 px height

pi_items.metadata_value: ±3% tolerance for width and height scaling
pi_items.verified_value: ±3% tolerance confirmed in verifier.py line 163: tolerance=3
±2% (0.02) tolerance confirmed in verifier.py line 166: tolerance=0.02
Minimum dimension requirement confirmed in verifier.py line 172: min_dimension=50

pi_items.metadata_value: Score ≥ 75% (at least 3 out of 4 criteria met)
pi_items.verified_value: Pass requires score ≥ 75, calculated as (criteria_met / total_criteria) * 100 where total_criteria=4

pi_items.metadata_value: 4 main criteria: 1) width scaled to 50%, 2) height scaled to 50%, 3) aspect ratio maintained, 4) meaningfully downscaled
pi_items.verified_value: 4 criteria confirmed: width_accurate, height_accurate, aspect_preserved, meaningfully_downscaled

pi_items.metadata_value: Primary source: Real Unsplash images; Fallback: ImageMagick-generated synthetic image
pi_items.verified_value: Primary: Real Unsplash photos (verified accessible and 800x600). Fallback: ImageMagick 'convert' command creates synthetic 800x600 image if Unsplash download fails

privileged_info_summary: The scale_by_percentage task uses real data from Unsplash (800x600 JPEG images). The task requires scaling images to 50% of original dimensions (400x300 pixels target) while maintaining aspect ratio. Verification accepts ±3% scaling tolerance and ±2% aspect ratio tolerance. The task passes if at least 3 of 4 criteria are met: width scaled correctly, height scaled correctly, aspect ratio maintained, and image meaningfully downscaled. Timeout is 90 seconds with maximum 8 steps allowed.
